# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

apiVersion: envoy.mesh.gloo.solo.io/v1
kind: EnvoyConfig
metadata:
  name: envoy-config
spec:
  resources:
    - name: virtual-service
      resourceSpec:
        apiVersion: v1
        kind: VirtualService
        metadata:
          name: my-virtual-service
        spec:
          hosts:
            - "*"
          routes:
            - name: my-route
              match:
                prefix: "/"
              routeAction:
                destination:
                  serviceRef:
                    name: my-service
              filters:
                - name: envoy.filters.http.retry
                  typedConfig:
                    "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.retry.v3.RetryPolicy
                    numRetries: 3
                - name: envoy.filters.http.timeout
                  typedConfig:
                    "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.timeout.v3.TimeoutPolicy
                    perRequestTimeout: 5s
                - name: envoy.filters.http.router
                  typedConfig:
                    "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router
